title: marshallia graminifolia subsp. graminifolia
intro: Marshallia graminifolia subsp. graminifolia, also known as grassland rosinweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing congestion, soothing sore throats, and providing relief from bronchitis. Marshallia graminifolia subsp. graminifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
